skeleton_shape: [16, 17, 4] — 16 frames, 17 joints, 4 features (x_norm, y_norm, vx, vy)
frame_rate: 12fps for JAAD, 30fps with FRAME_STEP=15 for PIE (effectively 2fps sampled)
normalization: coordinates divided by bounding box width/height
missing_joints: forward-fill from previous frame if visibility < 0.5
zero_headpose_rate: 92.6% — Face Mesh fails on distant pedestrians
zero_skeleton_rate: 22% — MediaPipe fails on very small bounding boxes
